title: Die Goldsucher von Arkansas
writer: Herbert Reinecker, Werner P. Zibaso, Hans Billian
actors: Brad Harris, Horst Frank, Ralf Wolter
plot: When gold is found near Marble City the rush brings farmer Brendel, Pastor Benson and gambler Ellis to town. Bandits and Cherokees threaten the settlers. Friends Phil and Pat try to restore order and find the culprit causing the m...
